market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Step into our 1-bedroom self-contained studio offering spacious living for up to 4 guests at just £95.6/night. With a 4.97-star rating from 439 guests and 42% availability over the next 90 days, this well-positioned property combines value with quality. While our rate is 38% below the local market median, we believe there's untapped potential to boost occupancy without compromising our exceptional guest satisfaction. Key features include [insert core amenity categories here] to ensure a comfortable stay. Note that as a new host, we're continuously refining our offering based on guest feedback. Book securely and experience [city name] living at its most affordable.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize a clean interior shot of the living area as cover photo to showcase space and layout, as 68% of local top listings feature a living room in position 1
key_diagnosis: Title exceeds 50 characters (current: 51) and lacks local SEO keywords, costing visibility despite high rating
Occupancy (42.4%) trails local median (47.8%) despite 38% price discount, suggesting missed booking potential
0 listed amenities vs market cohort's average 8+ categories, reducing perceived value at entry price point
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £95.6 rate is 38% below our local median of £154.6 yet occupancy trails it by 5.4 percentage points—an opportunity to increase bookings with smart listing optimization.
